name: Miniflux
short_description: Minimalist self-hosted RSS reader with focus mode and keyboard navigation.
description: Miniflux is a fast and minimal RSS reader with an emphasis on usability and privacy. It supports managing subscriptions, auto-refresh schedules, and read/unread state in a clean interface that runs entirely in the browser.
usecases: Centralize RSS feeds into one lightweight self-hosted interface.
Read articles distraction-free with built-in keyboard shortcuts.
Share feeds and integrations with automation pipelines.
notes: Set a secure ADMIN_PASSWORD before public exposure.
Store feed database backups from Postgres data volume.
